name: Dal Tadka
description: Classic North Indian dal made with yellow lentils, tempered with ghee, garlic, cumin, and traditional spices. Best enjoyed with jeera rice or roti.

name: Tandoori Aloo
description: Baby potatoes marinated in a spicy yogurt-based masala with traditional Indian spices, then roasted in a tandoor until crispy outside and soft inside. Served with mint chutney and fresh salad for a flavorful experience.

name: Mutton Rogan Josh
description: Authentic North Indian mutton curry made with tender mutton pieces slow-cooked in rich onion-tomato gravy and aromatic spices. Best paired with naan or steamed rice.

name: Chilli Chicken
description: Spicy and crispy chicken tossed with onions, capsicum, green chilies, and flavorful Indo-Chinese sauces. A popular dish best enjoyed hot with noodles or fried rice.

name: Chicken Gravy Noodles
description: Soft noodles served with flavorful chicken gravy loaded with vegetables, garlic, soy sauce, and Indo-Chinese spices. A rich and satisfying meal served hot.

name: Spicy Tomato Rice
description: Delicious South Indian rice dish cooked with tangy tomatoes, onions, curry leaves, and aromatic spices. Served hot with papad and chutney.

name: Veg Manchurian Gravy
description: Crispy vegetable balls tossed in spicy and flavorful Indo-Chinese gravy made with garlic, soy sauce, and mixed vegetables. Best served with fried rice or noodles.

name: Veg Fried Rice
description: Flavorful Indo-Chinese fried rice cooked with fresh vegetables, soy sauce, garlic, and aromatic seasonings. Served hot and perfect with Manchurian or chilli dishes.

name: Tandoori Fish
description: Fresh fish pieces marinated in spicy yogurt masala and grilled in a traditional tandoor. Served with mint chutney, lemon slices, and onion rings. Crispy outside and soft, juicy inside with a rich smoky flavor.

name: Mutton Nihari
description: Traditional Mughlai slow-cooked mutton stew prepared with rich spices, flavorful gravy, and tender meat. Served hot with naan or rumali roti for an authentic royal taste.

name: Butter Naan
description: Soft and fluffy tandoor-baked naan topped with melted butter. Perfect accompaniment for North Indian curries and gravies. Served hot and fresh.

name: Masala Dosa
description: Crispy South Indian dosa filled with flavorful potato masala, served with coconut chutney and hot sambar. A classic and popular breakfast meal.

name: Tandoori Broccoli
description: Fresh broccoli florets are marinated in hung curd, tandoori spices, ginger-garlic paste, and mild seasonings, then grilled in a traditional clay oven (tandoor). It has a rich smoky flavor and is best served hot with mint chutney.

name: Classic Curd Rice
description: Refreshing South Indian curd rice made with steamed rice, fresh curd, and traditional tempering of mustard seeds, curry leaves, and green chilies. Served chilled with pickle.

name: South Indian Lemon Rice
description: Tangy and flavorful rice prepared with fresh lemon juice, curry leaves, mustard seeds, peanuts, and traditional South Indian spices. Served with pickle and papad.

name: Mutton Seekh Kebab
description: Juicy minced mutton mixed with aromatic spices, shaped on skewers and grilled in a traditional tandoor. Served hot with mint chutney, lemon wedges, and onion rings. Perfect smoky flavor and soft texture.

name: Cheese Chicken Burger
description: Juicy chicken patty layered with melted cheese, fresh lettuce, onions, and special sauce inside a soft toasted bun. Served hot for a delicious fast-food treat.

name: Chicken Korma
description: Classic Mughlai chicken curry cooked in rich creamy gravy with yogurt, cashews, onions, and aromatic spices. Perfectly paired with naan, paratha, or rice.

name: Deluxe North Indian Thali
description: Complete North Indian meal platter including paneer curry, dal, seasonal vegetable, rice, butter naan, salad, pickle, dessert, and raita. Perfect for a full traditional dining experience.

name: Schezwan Chicken
description: Spicy Indo-Chinese chicken dish cooked in authentic Schezwan sauce with garlic, onions, capsicum, and red chilies. Served hot with bold flavors and smoky taste.

name: Mughlai Mutton Korma
description: Tender mutton slow-cooked in rich Mughlai-style creamy gravy with yogurt, cashews, onions, and aromatic spices. Best enjoyed with naan, rumali roti, or biryani rice.

name: Fresh Coconut Chutney
description: Authentic South Indian coconut chutney made with fresh coconut, roasted chana dal, green chilies, and tempered spices. Perfect side dish for dosa, idli, and vada.

name: Shahi Paneer
description: Rich and creamy Mughlai paneer curry prepared with soft paneer cubes, cashew gravy, fresh cream, and aromatic royal spices. Best served with naan or jeera rice.

name: Onion Uttapam
description: Soft and thick South Indian uttapam topped with fresh onions, tomatoes, and green chilies. Served with coconut chutney and hot sambar for a delicious meal.

name: Chicken Seekh Kebab
description: Juicy minced chicken kebabs blended with Mughlai spices and grilled to perfection in tandoor style. Served hot with mint chutney and onion salad.

name: Kadai Paneer
description: Delicious paneer cubes cooked with capsicum, onions, tomatoes, and aromatic kadai spices in rich North Indian style gravy. Best served with naan or butter roti.

name: Paneer Combo Meal
description: Special North Indian combo meal including paneer butter masala, jeera rice, 2 butter naan, salad, and soft drink. A complete and satisfying meal for one person.

name: Idli Vada Combo
description: Soft steamed idlis and crispy medu vadas served with fresh coconut chutney and hot sambar. A traditional and healthy South Indian favorite.

name: Chilli Paneer
description: Crispy paneer cubes stir-fried with onions, capsicum, garlic, and spicy Indo-Chinese sauces. A flavorful and popular starter served hot.

name: Veg Seekh Kebab
description: A delicious mix of finely minced vegetables, paneer, and aromatic spices shaped into seekh kebabs and roasted in a traditional tandoor. Served with green chutney, onion rings, and lemon for a smoky and flavorful experience.

name: Mutton Rogan Josh
description: Authentic Mughlai-style Rogan Josh made with tender mutton cooked in rich aromatic gravy with Kashmiri spices and herbs. Best served with naan or steamed rice.

name: Tandoori Roti
description: Made from whole wheat dough, this roti is soft yet slightly crispy and baked in a traditional clay oven (tandoor). Its smoky flavor and light char make it a perfect accompaniment to dal, curries, and kebabs.

name: Butter Chicken
description: Tender chicken cooked in a creamy tomato-butter gravy with rich North Indian spices and herbs. A flavorful dish best served with butter naan or jeera rice.

name: Veg Pulao
description: Fragrant basmati rice cooked with fresh vegetables, whole spices, and herbs in traditional North Indian style. Served hot with raita or curry.

name: Traditional Sambar Rice
description: Flavorful South Indian rice dish cooked with aromatic sambar, vegetables, and traditional spices. Served hot with papad and pickle.

name: Veg Spring Rolls
description: Crispy golden spring rolls stuffed with seasoned vegetables and Indo-Chinese spices. Served hot with spicy schezwan dip for a crunchy and flavorful snack.

name: Chicken Mughlai Paratha
description: Crispy and layered Mughlai-style paratha stuffed with spiced chicken filling, eggs, and aromatic herbs. Served hot with chutney and salad.

name: Hyderabadi Mutton Haleem
description: Rich and slow-cooked Mughlai delicacy made with tender mutton, wheat, lentils, ghee, and aromatic spices. Garnished with fried onions, lemon, and fresh coriander.

name: Chicken Pasanda
description: Rich Mughlai-style chicken curry cooked in creamy cashew and yogurt gravy with mild spices and aromatic herbs. Best served with naan or jeera rice.

name: Chicken Manchurian
description: Juicy chicken pieces tossed in spicy Indo-Chinese Manchurian sauce with garlic, onions, capsicum, and soy flavors. Perfect side dish with fried rice or noodles.

name: Veg Hakka Noodles
description: Stir-fried Hakka noodles tossed with fresh vegetables, garlic, soy sauce, and Indo-Chinese seasonings. Served hot with delicious smoky flavor.

name: Chicken Curry
description: Traditional North Indian chicken curry cooked with tender chicken pieces, onions, tomatoes, and authentic Indian spices. Served best with naan, roti, or steamed rice.

name: Ven Pongal
description: Traditional South Indian dish made with rice, moong dal, ghee, black pepper, cumin, and cashews. Served hot with coconut chutney and sambar.

name: Tandoori Chicken Full
description: Fresh full chicken marinated in yogurt, spices, and grilled in a traditional tandoor. Served with mint chutney and onion salad. Smoky flavor and juicy texture make it perfect for dinner.

name: Hyderabadi Chicken Biryani
description: Authentic Hyderabadi-style chicken biryani made with fragrant basmati rice, tender chicken, and rich aromatic spices. Served with raita and salan.

name: Tandoori Butter Garlic Prawns
description: Juicy prawns marinated in a rich blend of yogurt, butter, garlic, and traditional Indian spices, then grilled in a tandoor for a smoky flavor. Served hot with mint chutney and lemon wedges.

name: Paneer Butter Masala
description: Creamy and rich North Indian curry made with fresh paneer cubes cooked in buttery tomato gravy with aromatic spices. Best served with naan, roti, or jeera rice.

name: South Indian Filter Coffee
description: Traditional South Indian filter coffee made with freshly brewed coffee decoction and creamy milk. Served hot with rich aroma and authentic taste.

name: Hot & Sour Soup
description: Spicy and tangy Indo-Chinese soup prepared with fresh vegetables, soy sauce, garlic, and aromatic spices. Served hot for a comforting and flavorful starter.
